_comment: Bad case 16 — TAXI_CLEARED + pilot tunes Tower vorzeitig (LSZG EU). Frequency-auto-correction muss State auf TOWER_CONTACT vorruecken, damit READY_FOR_DEPARTURE im richtigen Template landet (cleared for takeoff), nicht im 'contact Tower on X'-Template.
name: Bad case 16 — TAXI_CLEARED -> TOWER (frequency auto-correction)

say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar at parking request taxi runway 06

say.note: Step 2 — auf Tower 'ready for departure' -> cleared for takeoff (NICHT 'contact Tower')
say.text: Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar holding short ready for departure
